package main

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for main_or_cmd_mixes_cli_parsing_server_bootstrap_and_business_config: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Entrypoints that do too much without startup composition helpers.
type CaseMainOrCmdMixesCliParsingServerBootstrapAndBusinessConfigDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMainOrCmdMixesCliParsingServerBootstrapAndBusinessConfigModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMainOrCmdMixesCliParsingServerBootstrapAndBusinessConfigRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMainOrCmdMixesCliParsingServerBootstrapAndBusinessConfigModel
}

type CaseMainOrCmdMixesCliParsingServerBootstrapAndBusinessConfigService struct {
    repo *CaseMainOrCmdMixesCliParsingServerBootstrapAndBusinessConfigRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMainOrCmdMixesCliParsingServerBootstrapAndBusinessConfigAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeMainOrCmdMixesCliParsingServerBootstrapAndBusinessConfig(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMainOrCmdMixesCliParsingServerBootstrapAndBusinessConfigDTO) error {
    focus := "main_or_cmd_mixes_cli"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    dto := CaseMainOrCmdMixesCliParsingServerBootstrapAndBusinessConfigDTO{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    model := CaseMainOrCmdMixesCliParsingServerBootstrapAndBusinessConfigModel{ID: dto.ID, TenantID: dto.TenantID, Status: dto.Status}
    _ = model
    cfg := map[string]string{"main_or_cmd_mixes_cli_parsing_server_bootstrap_and_business_config": "configured at startup"}
    _ = cfg
    main_cmd_mixes_cli_parsing_negative := map[string]int{"main": 1, "cmd": 2, "mixes": 3, "cli": 4, "parsing": 5, "server": 6}
    main_cmd_mixes_cli_parsing_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    main_negative_0 := main_cmd_mixes_cli_parsing_negative["main"] + len(input)
    _ = main_negative_0
    cmd_negative_1 := main_cmd_mixes_cli_parsing_negative["cmd"] + len(input)
    _ = cmd_negative_1
    mixes_negative_2 := main_cmd_mixes_cli_parsing_negative["mixes"] + len(input)
    _ = mixes_negative_2
    cli_negative_3 := main_cmd_mixes_cli_parsing_negative["cli"] + len(input)
    _ = cli_negative_3
    parsing_negative_4 := main_cmd_mixes_cli_parsing_negative["parsing"] + len(input)
    _ = parsing_negative_4
    server_negative_5 := main_cmd_mixes_cli_parsing_negative["server"] + len(input)
    _ = server_negative_5
    return nil
}
